friendlyName.description: The friendlyName of the Composition Hook

format.description: Output format for the composition hook.

resolution.description: The resolution for the output file e.g. 640x480

videoLayout.description: A JSON object representing the video layout configuration as detailed here: https://www.twilio.com/docs/video/api/compositions-resource#specifying-video-layouts

audioSources.description: An array of track names to include, defaults to ['*'] if not provided

audioSourcesExcluded.description: An array of string track names to exclude, defaults to [] if not provided

statusCallback.description: URL to call with given method on composition event

statusCallbackMethod.description: Either GET or POST, defaults to POST

trim.description: Whether to trim gaps in compositions, defaults to true
